title: YöL Christmas Pet Dog Puppy Blanket Festive Warm Sherpa Fluffy Comforter Fleece Xmas Cute Super Soft 90x70cm
features: FESTIVE: Our Sherpa pet blanket is the perfect way to keep your furry companion cosy and comfortable this Winter. It features a fun dog print design with a playful bone and star pattern, the perfect gift for your dog on Christmas Day!

WARM: Most dogs just like humans do get cold from time to time. Dogs with short hair or thin coats – greyhounds, Chihuahuas and even pit bulls – can get chilly pretty easily. But by giving your dog a blanket to nest in, you’ll help them stay warmer and more comfortable.

ANXIETY: The term comfort blanket also applies to dogs; the right kind of blanket will often provide your pup with a sense of security and love as result reducing anxiety and making your pet happier. Young puppies often experience a bit of loneliness when they’re separated from their mother and siblings. A nice, comfy blanket can help provide them with the warmth and body contact they’re missing.

PROTECTION: As well as an important item for your dog to have to keep them warm and less anxious they are often a perfect purchase if you want your dog to not ruin your much-loved sofa. If you do own nice furniture, but you don’t want to prohibit your dog from snoozing on the couch or recliner, a durable blanket can help protect your things.
SIZE: Each blanket is designed with Sherpa fabric on one side and a beautiful cartoon dog print on the other displaying many breeds. Made from super soft material measuring 90x70cm.
